title: Raven's Gameplay Enhancements
description: An assortment of vanilla-like enhancements and modifications to make the game more interesting.
body:
# Raven's Gameplay Enhancements

...is a mod that aims to tweak the vanilla experience to be more slightly more interesting, either by adding new vanilla-like features, or by simply making the experience a little more difficult for seasoned players.

A comprehensive list of features can be found over on the mod's [GitHub Wiki Page](https://github.com/AnAngryRaven/ravens-gameplay-enhancements/wiki), but for your convenience, here's a humorous summary of:

## Features
### Stashable Utilities
Are you tired of not being able to store your utility items in a bundle with other things? Well good news, now you can! Items like shears, brushes, potions, and more can be stored in a bundle with other items! Neat!

Even better news: you can add *more* items to that list yourself! Wow! Isn't that amazing?? Just see the wiki for details.

### Electrolytic Copper Corrosion
Tired of copper's slow process of becoming oxidised? Well, utilising the power of lightning and chemistry, you can now flash oxidise copper during a thunderstorm! Just surround a gold block with copper, place a lightning rod on top, and ask Zeus for a favour to see the copper oxidise right before your very eyes!

Players with a desire for making things harder will have to be careful though -- this corrosive process can be hungry sometimes!

### Mace Swing
You must have been working out recently, as now your mace swings (when not smashing the ground) attack multiple enemies at once! Seems you have a more effective utilisation of this heavy weapon now 🙂‍↕️

Though if you'd like to hit a few more enemies at once, I've heard there's a new enchantment to make it easier on those newly formed muscles of yours...

### Mending Rework
When you think about it, being able to easily and magically repair your items should be a major reward! Well good news citizen: Mending books are now only present within Ancient City and End City chests! Choose wisely what you want to put them on... the Warden is no joke, after all!

Though if fish fear you, you might still be able to scrounge a few from the ocean. But I mean hey, the Warden gets lonely down there sometimes! You should still pay a visit <3

### Anvil Repair
There's nothing magical about repairing items on an anvil -- so why does it take the magical essence of living creatures to do it?!? No longer shall this injustice plague the realm! Anvil repairs now only cost materials to perform.

### Choral Potions
Ever wanted to randomly teleport a friend? No? Well, too bad! Because with the newly formulated Choral Potion, you can now do *just* that!

### Saturation Overfill
Tired of all that extra nutrition from your food going nowhere when your hunger is almost full? Well, be tired no longer! This extra nutrition now spills over into your saturation, meaning no nutrition is wasted!

## Bug Reporting and Contributing
Found a bug? Report it [here](https://github.com/AnAngryRaven/ravens-gameplay-enhancements/issues)! Just hit the "Create Issue" button, and input information accordingly.

Want to contribute? Give the [Contributing.md](https://github.com/AnAngryRaven/ravens-gameplay-enhancements/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) file a quick read! It has everything you need to know.

## Updates
The [README](https://github.com/AnAngryRaven/ravens-gameplay-enhancements/blob/master/README.md) file goes into a bit more detail, but the update priority for this mod is summarised as follows:

- Porting to new versions
- Developing for LTS / newest version
- Bugfixing other versions
- Porting features to other versions
